overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of a character in dark robes exploring a dimly lit gothic castle interior. The character walks through stone corridors lined with suits of armor, passes another student, ascends staircases including a spiral staircase, and ends at a wooden door in a small antechamber.

ornate stone column with carved capital

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a narrow gothic corridor with stone pillars and suits of armor standing along the walls. Warm light from chandeliers illuminates the stone floor as the character moves toward a distant archway.

segments.scene_description: The character continues through a similar stone corridor and passes another student carrying books. A wooden door appears on the left wall as the character progresses toward the next archway.

scene_state.functional_zone: grand hall with vaulted ceiling and burning braziers

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a grand hall with a high vaulted ceiling and large burning braziers on either side. The character ascends a wide stone staircase, passing through warm firelight toward the next corridor.

events.description: enters a tight spiral staircase with close stone walls

agents.ego_description: climbing the narrow spiral staircase with stone walls on both sides

rough-hewn stone wall of the staircase tower

iron wall-mounted lantern providing warm light

segments.scene_description: The character enters a narrow spiral staircase with close stone walls and wall-mounted lanterns. The camera follows the tight curve as the character ascends the winding stone steps.

events.description: exits spiral staircase into a small antechamber with a wooden door

agents.ego_description: approaching the large wooden door at the end of the small room

iron lantern hanging from the ceiling

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the spiral staircase into a small stone antechamber. A heavy studded wooden door stands at the far end, flanked by a wooden bench and a portrait painting, as the character approaches the door.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through narrow gothic corridors that gradually open into a grand, vaulted hall. It begins by trailing a character through a stone passageway lined with suits of armor, where warm chandelier light reflects off the floor toward a distant archway. As the character progresses through a similar corridor, they pass another student carrying books and move past a wooden door on the left. The scene then expands into a vast hall with high ceilings and burning braziers, shifting the lighting to a flickering orange glow. Finally, the camera follows the character as they ascend a wide stone staircase, moving through the firelight toward another corridor.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the claustrophobic ascent of a winding staircase into the stillness of a small stone antechamber. It begins by following the character up a narrow spiral staircase, where the camera tracks the tight curve of the stone walls illuminated by wall-mounted lanterns. As the character reaches the top of the winding steps, the confined space opens up into a modest room. The scene then shifts toward the far end of the chamber, passing a wooden bench and a portrait painting before finally coming to a halt at a heavy studded wooden door.
